data.title: Visual Storytelling
data.description: Creates a platform for dynamic sharing of personal stories through images and videos.
data.technical_spec: Supports high-resolution images and multi-format video uploads.

data.title: Influencer Ecosystem
data.description: Developed a robust environment supporting influencer marketing.
data.technical_spec: Features like IGTV and Stories cater to content creators.

data.title: Social Connectivity
data.description: Facilitates seamless interaction and networking between users.
data.technical_spec: Includes messaging, comments, and live video features.

data.title: User Empowerment
data.description: Offers tools for users to express creativity and individuality.
data.technical_spec: Photo editing tools, filters, and creative digital media options.

data.title: Community Support
data.description: Provides a sense of community with options for niche group creation.
data.technical_spec: Group features, hashtags, and community guidelines.
